title: Registry generation and query
outcome: Registry generation + jq query interface. lib/registry.sh emits compact JSON (one record per line, like tools.json): units.json (colocated-first discovery, central overrides colocated by id, projected to id/kind/title/status/domain/layer/path/native_manifests/entrypoints/provides/requires/policy/source + a by_kind summary), policies.json (every policy TOML parsed via the descriptor reader + source path), and skills.json/profiles.json seeds (empty arrays; E06/E05 populate from .agents/). bin/ontarch-sync writes all four under registry/ and reports counts; it reads (does not regenerate) Panoply's tools.json. jq cookbook: registry/QUERIES.md + 7 reusable filters (by-kind/layer/domain/status, requires, provides, depends-on). Refreshed the stale host-specific tools.json via `panoply doctor` (it predated Panoply's ANSI-escaping fix and had raw control chars). Docs: metadata-plane.md gained a 'Generation and queries' + token-cost section; ontarch README/AGENTS document the validate/sync tasks; wfos AGENTS allow-list adds the two agent-safe tasks. .gitignore now ignores registry/*.json + *.dot while keeping registry/sessions/ and the jq cookbook tracked.
validation: GATE moon run ontarch:sync PASS (units 3, policies 1, skills 0, profiles 0) and moon run ontarch:validate PASS (3/3). Filtered queries return correctly: kind=workspace -> {ds, wfos}; layer=application -> {ds, wfos}; domain=luckgrid -> {ds, panoply, wfos}; requires=proto -> wfos; provides=metadata.registry -> wfos. gitignore verified via git check-ignore (units/tools/policies json + graph.dot ignored; sessions/*.json, QUERIES.md, queries/*.jq tracked). Regression: moon run panoply:validate-substrate exit 0. shellcheck --severity=warning CLEAN.
decisions: registry JSON is compact (inline arrays, one record per line) to keep jq + RTK reads cheap, matching the tools.json shape
units.json de-dupes by id with central overriding colocated; each record carries source=colocated|central for provenance
the M1 query interface is a jq cookbook (QUERIES.md + queries/*.jq) per the epic DoD; a dedicated query command is deferred to Cthulhu (H09)
ontarch sync reads tools.json but never regenerates it — tools.json stays Panoply's artifact (panoply doctor)
next: E04.S3 — stand up Workstreams/.agents/ (READMEs + generated local-toolkit.yml)
token_note: one filtered query (jq over a small units.json) answers kind/layer/domain/dependency questions that otherwise need scanning moon.yml + each package manifest + READMEs; token-cost note recorded in QUERIES.md and docs/metadata-plane.md
